_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Analysis and synthesis (data ethics) involves expertly drawing together, analyse and evaluate qualitative and quantitative data; quickly read and interpret complex documents from a range of sources and distil to what is relevant; turning research data into clear findings that inform data ethics decisions for the entire organisation; build capacity in analysis and synthesis and involve others to increase consensus and challenge assumptions.
reference_document_element_description: Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extraction, transformation, analysis, and delivery of findings with documented methodology.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-013 (DQ, cosine: 0.495), DA-T-002 (DA, cosine: 0.473).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.582). Shared vocabulary: [analysis, data, findings]. DDaT-only terms [analyse, assumptions, build, capacity, challenge, clear] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytical, business, delivery, documented, execute, extraction] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.857 (P=0.837, R=0.877). R exceeds P by 0.040 — the WIDAI KSA's 18 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 63 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Analysis and synthesis (data ethics) involves expertly drawing together, analyse" and "Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extractio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.557 ≈ STS 0.582 (gap 0.024). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analysis, data, findings] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.8%. Shared tokens: [analysis, data, findings]. DDaT-only: [analyse, assumptions, build, capacity, challenge, clear]. WIDAI-only: [analytical, business, delivery, documented, execute, extraction].
